raw_response: Given your preference for the Apple brand and moderate price sensitivity, the Apple 35W Dual USB-C Charger is a suitable choice. It offers a sleek, compact design that fits well with other Apple devices. Although it lacks PPS support and has limited wattage compared to its competitors, its minimalist aesthetic and compatibility with Apple products make it worthwhile for users who prioritize brand consistency over cost efficiency.
